statement.headerDoc:
Andrica's Conjecture — Lean 4 Formalization (Mathlib edition)
  ==============================================================

  Conjecture (Andrica 1985): For all n ≥ 1,
      A_n = √p_{n+1} − √p_n  <  1
  equivalently (squaring both sides of g_n = p_{n+1} − p_n < 2√p_n + 1):
      g_n² < 4·p_n + 4·√p_n + 1
  Sufficient (stronger) condition:
      g_n² ≤ 4·p_n   ⟹   A_n < 1 (trivially since 4√p_n + 1 > 0)
  (The sufficient condition fails once at n=4: g_4 = 4, p_4 = 7, g_4² = 16 > 28. Hmm, 4·7 = 28. Wait 16 < 28, so it actually holds.)

  History:
    - max A_n occurs at n=4: A_4 = √11 − √7

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
